arts.ttl: What is Vitor Roque’s status for Barcelona vs Real Betis?
arts.sum: On-loan Barcelona star Vitor Roque will be eligible to line out against his parent club in the Copa del Rey next week. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have confirmed…

arts.ttl: Three talking points from Athletic 0-2 Barcelona
arts.sum: The Spain star sent Lamine Yamal through on goal to make it 2-0 in the second half and effectively finish off Athletic Club. Gavi hit Dani Olmo's celebration after scoring ⌚️ pic.twitter.com/Z9KGIBybmW

arts.ttl: Gavi, Yamal send Barcelona to Super Cup final
arts.sum: Goals from Gavi and Lamine Yamal earned Barcelona a 2-0 win over Athletic Bilbao in the Spanish Super Cup semi-final in Jeddah on Wednesday to reach their third successive final.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick & Lamine Yamal react to news of Dani Olmo & Pau Víctor registrations
arts.sum: Barcelona pair Hansi Flick and Lamine Yamal have this evening provided their responses to the news of the respective registrations of Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor. The names of Barca…

arts.ttl: Barcelona fans continue to take aim at 2 players despite win over Athletic Club
arts.sum: Supporters of La Liga giants Barcelona have on Wednesday taken firm aim at two leading members of the club’s first-team ranks. This comes owing to developments in Barcelona’s meeting with…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick expresses delight with registration decision after Spanish Supercup semi-final success
arts.sum: Barcelona are into the final of the 2025 Spanish Super Cup after a 2-0 victory over Athletic Club on Wednesday, and it turned out to be an extra special day for the Catalans as they were granted a precautionary measure for the registrations of Dani Olmo and Pau Victor prior to kick-off in Jeddah. Neither […] The post Hansi Flick expresses delight with registration decision after Spanish Supercup semi-final success appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona granted temporary permission to re-register Dani Olmo
arts.sum: Barcelona have temporarily won the battle to register Dani Olmo and Pau Victor to play in the second half of the season following an appeal to Spain’s national sports council (CSD).

arts.ttl: Yamal and Gavi lead Barcelona to 2-0 win over Atheltic Bilbao and into Spanish Super Cup final
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal and Gavi Páez scored to lead Barcelona past Athletic Bilbao 2-0 and into the Spanish Super Cup final on Wednesday. Gavi scored in the 17th minute of the semifinal for his first goal since the midfielder returned to playing in October after a serious leg injury that sidelined him for nearly a year.

arts.ttl: Barcelona able to field Olmo and Víctor after Spain’s sports council intervenes
arts.sum: Sports council grants players temporary registration Pair could feature in Sunday’s Spanish Super Cup final Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor will be able to play for Barcelona after Spain’s supreme sports council (CSD) granted them temporary registration while it investigates an appeal lodged by the club against the removal of their licences by La Liga. Registration did not arrive in time for Olmo or Víctor to play the semi-final of the Super Cup in Saudi Arabia on Wednesday night, but they will be available for Sunday’s final against Real Madrid or Real Mallorca.
